# Generated by tests/public_api_doc.rs via `cargo public-api --simplified`
# (regenerated on every `cargo test`; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Underscore-prefixed features are internal and excluded from the
# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub fn zenbitmaps::BmpEncoderConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

pub type zenbitmaps::BmpEncoderConfig::Job = zenbitmaps::BmpEncodeJob

pub struct zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob
impl<'a> zencodec::traits::decoding::DecodeJob<'a> for zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob
pub type zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::AnimationFrameDec = zencodec::traits::unsupported::Unsupported<zenbitmaps::BitmapError>

pub type zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::Error = zenbitmaps::BitmapError
pub type zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::StreamDec = zencodec::traits::unsupported::Unsupported<zenbitmaps::BitmapError>
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::animation_frame_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::traits::unsupported::Unsupported<zenbitmaps::BitmapError>, zenbitmaps::BitmapError>
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<zenbitmaps::PnmDecoder<'a>, zenbitmaps::BitmapError>
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::output_info(&self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::cost::OutputInfo, zenbitmaps::BitmapError>
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::probe(&self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::info::ImageInfo, zenbitmaps::BitmapError>
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::push_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &mut dyn zencodec::sink::DecodeRowSink, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::cost::OutputInfo, Self::Error>
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::streaming_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::traits::unsupported::Unsupported<zenbitmaps::BitmapError>, zenbitmaps::BitmapError>
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::with_limits(self, zencodec::limits::ResourceLimits) -> Self
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::with_policy(self, zencodec::policy::DecodePolicy) -> Self
pub fn zenbitmaps::PnmDecodeJob::with_stop(self, almost_enough::stop_token::StopToken) -> Self

impl core::marker::Send for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoder
impl core::marker::Sync for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoder
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoder
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoder

impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoder
pub struct zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig
impl zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::new() -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::clone(&self) -> zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig
impl core::default::Default for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl zencodec::traits::encoding::EncoderConfig for zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig
pub type zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::Error = zenbitmaps::BitmapError
pub type zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::Job = zenbitmaps::TgaEncodeJob
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::capabilities() -> &'static zencodec::capabilities::EncodeCapabilities
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::format() -> zencodec::format::ImageFormat
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::is_lossless(&self) -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::job(self) -> zenbitmaps::TgaEncodeJob
pub fn zenbitmaps::TgaEncoderConfig::supported_descriptors() -> &'static [zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]

pub trait zenbitmaps::DecodePixel: core::marker::Copy + 'static + zenbitmaps::pixel_traits::private::Sealed

impl zenbitmaps::DecodePixel for rgb::formats::bgr::Bgr<u8>

pub type zenbitmaps::BGR8 = rgb::formats::bgr::Bgr<u8>
pub type zenbitmaps::BGRA8 = rgb::formats::bgra::Bgra<u8>
pub type zenbitmaps::RGB8 = rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>
pub type zenbitmaps::RGBA8 = rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>
